tasks.label: C: Build Active File
args: $src='${file}'; $out='${fileDirname}\${fileBasenameNoExtension}.exe'; $gcc=Get-Command gcc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $cl=Get-Command cl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($gcc){ & gcc -O2 -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 "$src" -o "$out"; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){ exit $LASTEXITCODE } } elseif($cl){ & cl /nologo /W4 /std:c11 /Fe:"$out" "$src"; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){ exit $LASTEXITCODE } } else { Write-Error 'No C compiler found (gcc or cl).'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: C: Build and Run Active File
